title: Devika, Prannoy exit China Masters on opening day
indian_angle: Top Indian shuttlers Devika and HS Prannoy faced early exits at the China Masters.
summary: Devika, the Thailand Open Super 300 champion, and HS Prannoy both lost their opening round matches at the China Masters, marking a disappointing start for India.

title: PV Sindhu claims Japan Open crown, ends title drought
indian_angle: PV Sindhu secured her maiden Japan Open title, marking a significant return to form for the Indian star.
summary: Indian badminton ace PV Sindhu triumphed at the Japan Open, defeating local favorite Akane Yamaguchi in a dominant performance to end her recent title drought.

title: Kohli's cryptic remark fueled Sindhu's comeback
indian_angle: This feature delves into how a comment from Indian cricket captain Virat Kohli motivated PV Sindhu's recent resurgence.
summary: Sports scientist Wayne Lombard reveals the role of a cryptic remark from Virat Kohli in inspiring PV Sindhu's data-driven comeback and her return to top form.

title: BAI introduces 3x15 scoring for junior domestic events
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has implemented a new 3x15 scoring system for all domestic junior ranking tournaments and national championships.
summary: The BAI has announced a significant rule change, introducing a 3x15 scoring system for U-13, U-15, and U-17 domestic ranking tournaments and national championships, aiming to impact junior player development.

title: BAI releases World Junior Championships 2026 selection criteria
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued guidelines regarding player eligibility for selection to the upcoming World Junior Championships in Cairo.
summary: BAI has released crucial eligibility criteria for Indian players aspiring to participate in the BWF World Junior Championships 2026, outlining the selection process.

title: Chennai to host All India Senior Ranking Tournament
indian_angle: Chennai is set to host the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament, a key event for top Indian shuttlers.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has circulated details for the Yonex-Sunrise All India Senior Ranking Badminton Tournament 2026, scheduled to take place in Chennai from July 16th to 23rd.
